title: 12 O'Clock
actors: Guru Dutt, Waheeda Rehman, Shashikala Jawalkar
plot: Bani Chowdhury and solicitor Ajoy Kumar are deeply in love with each other. But their world comes crashing down when Bani's cousin, Maya is found dead in the first class compartment at a railway terminus in Bombay. Bani who had go...
